## Title 42
#### Article 4. Regul. of Vehicles & Traffic
##### § 42-4-1811 — Penalty

Unless otherwise specified in this part 18, any person who knowingly violates any of the provisions of this part 18 commits a petty offense and shall be punished as provided in section 18-1.3-503 .
